requirements.text: Each compiler loop should declare a required fresh-session or context-reset boundary at loop start.
Gateway validation should require fresh context/worktree isolation when semantic independence matters, especially implementation, task-close, and publication gates.
CodeWiki should expose and enforce isolation policy through build policy, validation reports, graph routing, skills, and tests rather than relying only on chat convention.

summary: Accepted intent: enforce loop and gateway isolation so compiler loops start from fresh session/context and validators do not reuse builder thought context.

diff_table.current_state: Builds and validations may record isolation metadata, but loop-start freshness is not explicit policy.
diff_table.desired_state: Builds declare loop/session isolation requirements and next-loop fresh-start expectations.
diff_table.rationale: Fresh loop context reduces contamination from prior compiler reasoning.

diff_table.desired_state: Semantic gateway profiles require fresh-context isolation evidence and block reports missing it.
diff_table.rationale: Validator independence is only useful if policy can reject missing evidence.

diff_table.current_state: Graph routing does not force a fresh session handoff at loop boundaries.
diff_table.desired_state: Graph next-action metadata names when a fresh session/context reset is required and what minimal handoff artifact starts it.
diff_table.rationale: Agents need actionable stop/start signals rather than buried prose.

accepted_decisions.summary: Fresh compiler-loop sessions are the default boundary.
Gateway validation must be fresh and independent for implementation, task-close, and publication profiles.
Docs/code/tests should make isolation a policy surface, not a convention.

assumptions: Same shell/session can be acceptable only when a clear context reset is explicitly recorded and policy does not require stronger isolation.
non_goals: Build automatic external session spawning in this task.
Prove a validator did not read prior chat beyond recorded isolation metadata.
